properties.name: Nsanje
properties.notes: Northern extent of Urema Graben.

properties.name: Ruo
properties.notes: Minor escarpment, with different sections defined by fault bends. Fault within Mozambique.

properties.name: Panga-1
properties.notes: Part of larger Panga Fault System a Karoo age structure that juxtaposes Karoo sediments and lavas in the footwall against Cretaceous sediments and recent alluvium. Intruded and subsequently deforms dyke, active pre and post Karoo.

properties.name: Panga-2
properties.notes: Part of larger Panga Fault System, a Karoo age structure that juxtaposes Karoo sediments and lavas in the footwall against Cretaceous sediments and recent alluvium. Intruded and subsequently deforms dyke, active pre and post Karoo.

properties.name: Panga-3

properties.name: Panga-4

properties.name: Elephant Marsh
properties.notes: High uncertainity on location, geometry, and activity of fault.

properties.name: Thyolo
properties.reference: Habgood, et al (1973); Castaing (1991); Hodge et al (2019); Williams et al (2019); Wedmore et al (2020b)
properties.notes: Segmented border fault for Lower Shire Basin. Parallel to gneissic foliation. Previously mapped as seperate Thyolo and Muona faults (Hodge et al 2019).

properties.notes: Eastern extent of this section mapped from aeromag. Karoo boundary fault, juxtaposes basement gneisses and alluvium, contains calcite and silicate fault rock. Parallel to gneiss foliation.

properties.name: Tsikulamowa
properties.notes: Fault does not follow foliation, relatively prominent scarp 60 m high. No or very thin (<1 m) sediments in hanging wall on geological map, confirmed by fieldwork.

properties.name: Cape Maclear
properties.notes: Termed the Chingombe Fault by Dawson and Kirkpatrick (1968). Juxtaposes charnockititc gneisses against recent sediments. Eastern tip of fault against syenite intrusion. Parallel to foliation in footwall. Low certainity on whether fault still active.
